For RabbitMQ and Go Defend the Asyncapi Cloudevents Contract model · Theory Asyncapi Cloudevents Contra…, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: A valid AsyncAPI document proves deployed routing and message behavior conform. In Go, decoding JSON into a struct is not complete runtime validation.
